basic_details.job_title: NIMHANS Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) Project Technical Support - III (Stem cell) Notification 2026 has been released on 18 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIMHANS Project Technical Support - III (Stem cell) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Project Technical Support - III (Stem cell): M.Sc. in Life Science / Biochemistry / Biotechnology / Biophysics / Chemistry with a good academic record.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIMHANS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for NIMHANS Project Technical Support - III (Stem cell) posts will be held on 12 May 2026. Candidates should report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support - III post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Life Science, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Biophysics, or Chemistry with a good academic record to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the NIMHANS Project Technical Support - III recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support - III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs.28,000/- per month, along with 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support - III post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy announced for the Project Technical Support - III (Stem cell) position at NIMHANS.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for NIMHANS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) as per the official notification released by NIMHANS.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and finally an Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, and any other relevant documents as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS), Bengaluru, Karnataka, 560029.
